calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-21-2023 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2023 Continued To Dec-20-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Re-Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-27-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for motion for default judgment prove-up hearing against Defendant Nanoshka Johnson.

Dept. 505; Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 1:54 p.m. and concluding at 2:02 p.m.(D505)
Steven Alfred Booska, Esq. appeared for and on behalf of Plaintiff Navigators Insurance Company via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Nanoshka Johnson not appearing.
Witness for Plaintiff Brian Bragg is placed under oath.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract filed on November 11, 2022.
Defendant was personal served on December 2, 2022.
Default was entered as to Defendant on January 24, 2023.
Dismissal filed as to Defendants Does 1 - 10 on August 8, 2023.
Parties were re-noticed by the Court of September 27, 2023 hearing date on September 6, 2023

Counsel for Plaintiff presents outline and summary of the case.

Witness for the Plaintiff is examined by the Court and confirms that Counsel for Plaintiff 's statements are true and correct.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the summary of the case, comments made by Plaintiff's Counsel, and the affirmation of Plaintiff's witness, the Court finds that Defendant is in breach of duty to Plaintiff for failure to return funds to Plaintiff.

The Court reviews the proposed judgment and finds that numbers listed do not correspond to the amount requested. The Court modifies the proposed judgment to reflect the granted amount for the Breach of Contract.

The Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Navigators Insurance Company and against Nanoshka Johnson as follows:

Damages $57,029.40
Interest $24,217.58
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $860.91

Proposed judgment signed as modified and filed.
